data.content:
Implementation complete on branch `codex/56d4-install-cli-warning`. Updated `scripts/install.sh` so the install warning only fires when `bd`, `kno`, and `knots` are all absent from PATH, and added focused installer coverage for the four PATH variants in `src/lib/__tests__/install-launcher-path.test.ts`.

Validation:
- `bun run lint`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run test`
- `bun run build`

Branch: codex/56d4-install-cli-warning
Commit: 659c1ad25cff
